mapper.select: SELECT oi.id_order_item, oi.id_order, oi.cn_order_item, oi.no_product, p.nm_product, oi.qt_unit_price, oi.qt_order_item, (oi.qt_unit_price * oi.qt_order_item) AS qt_order_item_amount FROM tb_order_item oi JOIN tb_product p ON oi.no_product = p.no_product WHERE oi.id_order = #{orderId} ORDER BY oi.cn_order_item ASC
